details.test: Task 1: Stake 500 LUMA in highest-APY short-term pool with auto-compounding
Task 2: Stake 200 in a flexible low-fee pool with LUMA rewards
Task 3: Move 300 LUMA from low-APY pool to higher-APY short lock pool
Task 4: Claim reward points from two programs totaling between 50 and 60
Task 5: Set up 8-week weekly auto-stake plan of 50 in flexible pool
Task 6: Use earnings calculator and save 90-day LUMA scenario
Task 7: Join LUMA Boosted APY promotion and apply to existing position
Task 8: Cast governance Yes vote with 100 LUMA voting power
Task 9: Create and save "Balanced income" portfolio view
